paper_title: Trophic strategies of intertidal foraminifera explored with single‐cell microbiome metabarcoding and morphological methods: What is on the menu?

methods.description: A method to investigate molecular data through microbiome interspecies comparison using DNA network analyses. This involves associating rDNA data (16S and 18S) extracted from foraminiferal species and sequenced with the Sanger method to highlight microbiome differences and similarities among species.

steps.description: Extract rDNA data (16S and 18S) from respective foraminiferal species.
steps.searchable_summary: extract rDNA data from foraminiferal species

steps.description: Sequence the extracted rDNA data using the Sanger method.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence rDNA data using Sanger method

steps.description: Perform DNA network analyses to associate rDNA data and highlight microbiome differences among species.
steps.searchable_summary: perform DNA network analyses on rDNA data

steps.description: Visualize the community analysis results to highlight species-specific microbiomes.
